# NOTIFICATION_TYPE_QUERY

****

A notification generated based on the conditions set forth in a subscription object.

## Declaration

```swift
const String NOTIFICATION_TYPE_QUERY;
```

## Constants

- **NOTIFICATION_TYPE_RECORD_ZONE**: A notification generated when the contents of a record zone changed.
